description_long: This is a sleek, modern computer mouse with an ergonomic, contoured shape designed for comfortable hand placement. The body is predominantly matte black with subtle glossy accents, and it features a prominent scroll wheel at the center, flanked by a green button and an orange button for additional functionality. The left side of the mouse has a textured grip area and an extra button, likely for thumb access, enhancing usability for tasks such as browsing or gaming. The top surface displays a stylized logo, suggesting a branded product, and the overall design is streamlined for both aesthetics and performance. The mouse appears to be wireless, as there are no visible cables or ports, and is likely powered by an internal battery. Its compact size and lightweight construction make it ideal for desktop use in urban environments such as offices, homes, or internet cafes.
description: A modern, ergonomic black computer mouse with a scroll wheel, colored buttons, and a textured side grip. It features a sleek, contoured design with a visible logo and is likely wireless.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the contoured black surface, central scroll wheel, green and orange buttons, and a visible logo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth, curved profile and the absence of visible buttons or ports on this side.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the scroll wheel, green and orange buttons, and the overall symmetrical design.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the textured grip area and an additional side button for thumb access.
